ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
( LEN(Israeli_ID_number__c) > 0 && OR( LEN(Israeli_ID_number__c) <> 9, AND( LEN(Israeli_ID_number__c) = 9, IF(( MOD(( VALUE(RIGHT(LEFT( Israeli_ID_number__c, 9), 1))+ VALUE(IF((VALUE(RIGHT(LEFT( Israeli_ID_number__c, 8), 1)) *2)>9, TEXT( MOD((VALUE(RIGHT(LEFT( Israeli_ID_number__c, 8), 1)) *2),10)+1 ), TEXT( MOD((VALUE(RIGHT(LEFT( Israeli_ID_number__c, 8), 1)) *2),10) )))+ VALUE(RIGHT(LEFT( Israeli_ID_number__c, 7), 1))+ VALUE(IF((VALUE(RIGHT(LEFT( Israeli_ID_number__c, 6), 1)) *2)>9, TEXT( MOD((VALUE(RIGHT(LEFT( Israeli_ID_number__c, 6), 1)) *2),10)+1 ), TEXT( MOD((VALUE(RIGHT(LEFT( Israeli_ID_number__c, 6), 1)) *2),10) )))+ VALUE(RIGHT(LEFT( Israeli_ID_number__c, 5), 1))+ VALUE(IF((VALUE(RIGHT(LEFT( Israeli_ID_number__c, 4), 1)) *2)>9, TEXT( MOD((VALUE(RIGHT(LEFT( Israeli_ID_number__c, 4), 1)) *2),10)+1 ), TEXT( MOD((VALUE(RIGHT(LEFT( Israeli_ID_number__c, 4), 1)) *2),10) )))+ VALUE(RIGHT(LEFT( Israeli_ID_number__c, 3), 1))+ VALUE(IF((VALUE(RIGHT(LEFT( Israeli_ID_number__c, 2), 1)) *2)>9, TEXT( MOD((VALUE(RIGHT(LEFT( Israeli_ID_number__c,2), 1)) *2),10)+1 ), TEXT( MOD((VALUE(RIGHT(LEFT( Israeli_ID_number__c, 2), 1)) *2),10) )))+ VALUE(RIGHT(LEFT( Israeli_ID_number__c, 1), 1))),10)
)=0, false, true))))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Israeli ID number is not valid
